iotwireless.wirelessgateway.Description.Description: The description of the new resource. The maximum length is 2048 characters.

iotwireless.wirelessgateway.LastUplinkRe.Description: The date and time when the most recent uplink was received.

iotwireless.wirelessgateway.LoRaWAN.Description: The gateway configuration information to use to create the wireless gateway.

iotwireless.wirelessgateway.Name.Description: The name of the new resource.

iotwireless.wirelessgateway.Tags.Description: The tags are an array of key-value pairs to attach to the specified resource. Tags can have a minimum of 0 and a maximum of 50 items.

iotwireless.wirelessgateway.ThingArn.Description: The ARN of the thing to associate with the wireless gateway.

iotwireless.wirelessgateway.ThingName.Description: The name of the thing associated with the wireless gateway. The value is empty if a thing isn't associated with the gateway.
